title: SatiCentral.StructuredLogEntry
description: Authoritative schema for all structured log entries in Sati-Central. Every log entry on a production code path must conform to this schema. Freeform strings are permitted only in the 'message' field. All other fields are typed.

schema_version.description: Log schema version. Allows parsers to handle multiple schema generations.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds. Derived from UUIDv7 where possible for monotonic ordering.

level.description: Log level. FATAL implies the component is halting.

component.description: Which Sati-Central component emitted this entry.

event_kind.description: Typed event category. Determines which fields in 'payload' are required.

message.description: Human-readable summary. The ONLY freeform string field. Must not contain structured data — put that in payload.

trace_id.description: OTel trace ID (32 hex chars). All zero if no active trace.

span_id.description: OTel span ID (16 hex chars). Null if not inside a span.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent or process that emitted this entry (e.g., 'root-spine', 'antigravity', 'claude-code').

request_id.description: UUIDv7 for the request/operation this log entry belongs to. Null for system-level events.

proposal_id.description: UUIDv7 of the ActionProposal in context, if any.

safety_tier.description: Safety verification tier active when this entry was emitted, if applicable.

policy_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex of the policy constraint set at emission time. Null if safety-rail not involved.

fitness_metric.description: Which fitness metric this entry relates to, if any.

merkle_leaf_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the Merkle leaf written as a result of this event, if one was written.

error.description: Structured error details. Required when level is ERROR or FATAL.

payload.description: Event-specific structured payload. Schema depends on event_kind. Must not contain freeform narrative — use message for that.

duration_ms.description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds, if this entry closes an operation.

model_version.description: LLM model identifier string if this entry was emitted during model inference.

EventKind.description: Typed event category. Freeform event names are not permitted.

context.description: Structured context specific to this error kind.

recoverable.description: True if the system can continue operating; false if this error requires human intervention.
